prompt: Ich habe ein internes CRUD-Tool für unser HR-Team entworfen. 50 Nutzer max. Die architecture.md ist fertig, jetzt brauche ich die richtige Architektur.

assertions.text: Recommends Layered or Modular Monolith or Microkernel as the top candidate (these score highest on simplicity+testability+deployability)
Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
Explicitly warns against or deprioritizes Microservices, Event-Driven, or Space-Based for this use case
Highlights low cost ($ for monoliths) as an advantage given the budget constraints
Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
Identifies a clear winner without needing extensive qualifying questions (simplicity dominates the scoring)
